_comment: PLACEHOLDER / HAND-CURATED DEMO DATA. Coordinates are plausible points inside the fetch_graph.py bbox (NH66 Nethravathi Bridge crossing between Mangaluru and Ullal); populations are illustrative round numbers for the pitch demo, not measured data. Zone/POI placement verified programmatically: removing the bridge's 3 edge segments (see CRITICAL_BRIDGE_EDGE_IDS in graph_service.py) splits the graph into a north (Mangaluru) and south (Ullal) component with no other connecting route in this extract, and every north-* zone/POI below snaps to the north component while every south-* one snaps to the south component. Edit freely before the real demo.
